description_long: This is a medium-sized, brown leather backpack with a simple, utilitarian design. The main compartment is covered by a large flap secured with a strap and metal rivets, giving it a classic, rugged appearance. On each side, there are small external pockets with flaps and strap closures, suitable for carrying small items. The back features two wide, adjustable shoulder straps made from the same material as the body, attached with metal buckles for durability. The surface of the backpack is slightly textured, resembling pebbled leather, and shows some subtle wear, adding to its realistic look. There are no visible logos, decorative elements, or zippers, emphasizing its functional and minimalist style.
description: A brown, leather-textured backpack with a large flap closure, side pockets, and wide adjustable straps. The design is simple, rugged, and functional, with no visible logos or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap closure with a central strap and rivets, and the tops of the side pockets.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the side pocket with flap and strap, and the profile of the main flap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two wide, adjustable shoulder straps and the back panel.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the left side pocket with flap and strap, and the side profile of the main compartment.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, adjustable shoulder straps made of matching brown material with metal buckles; no visible padding or chest strap.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment with a flap closure, two side pockets with flap and strap closures; no visible mesh or internal pockets.
